name: Update Pages

on:
  workflow_dispatch:   # workflow_dispatch 이벤트 추가
    inputs:
      trigger:         # 워크플로우가 호출될 때 사용하는 인풋을 설정 (필요에 따라 수정 가능)
        description: 'Trigger update for blog and projects'
        required: true
        default: 'true'

jobs:
  update:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v4
      with:
        python-version: 3.x

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Run metadata extraction for blog and projects
      run: |
        python ./assets/py/extract-metadata.py

    - name: Generate HTML for Blog
      run: |
        python ./assets/py/generate-recent-posts-blog.py

    - name: Generate HTML for Projects
      run: |
        python ./assets/py/generate-recent-posts-projects.py

    - name: Update index.html for Blog
      run: |
        python ./assets/py/generate-recent-posts.py blog

    - name: Update index.html for Projects
      run: |
        python ./assets/py/generate-recent-posts.py projects

    - name: Commit and Push Changes
      run: |
        git config --global user.name "github-actions"
        git config --global user.email "github-actions@github.com"
        git add .
        git commit -m "Update blog and project posts"
        git push
